news.news: GSK's M72/AS01E tuberculosis vaccine candidate, developed using advanced adjuvant technology, has progressed toward global access through a new manufacturing agreement between the Gates Medical Research Institute and Serum Institute of India. This partnership aims to ensure large-scale production and availability of the vaccine candidate pending successful Phase 3 trial outcomes.

Plowshare Therapies has selected OXB as its GMP manufacturing partner to support the development and manufacturing of its AAV gene therapy programme, including the lead candidate PLOW-101 for maple syrup urine disease. The collaboration will utilize OXB's FDA-approved commercial-scale viral vector facility in Durham, North Carolina.
